title: Euler's Formula Explorer
description: Interactive visualization demonstrating Euler's formula e^(iθ) = cos(θ) + i·sin(θ) with synchronized unit circle rotation and sine/cosine wave traces.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Mathematics
Signal Processing
Complex Analysis
Euler's Formula
learningObjectives: Understand the mathematical concept of euler's formula explorer
Apply euler's formula explorer to solve problems
Visualize and interpret euler's formula explorer relationships
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on euler's formula explorer
